differences.justification: GuardrailRequestParams is a langchain4j-core type intentionally exposed by canary token guardrails for invocation-scoped state propagation; revapi cannot resolve it because checkDependencies=false
InputGuardrailRequest is a langchain4j-core type required by the InputGuardrail SPI implemented here; revapi cannot resolve it because checkDependencies=false
OutputGuardrailRequest is a langchain4j-core type required by the OutputGuardrail SPI implemented here; revapi cannot resolve it because checkDependencies=false
